message:
Simplify: use Claude App instead of custom workflows

Remove the custom workflow infrastructure - the Claude GitHub App
already handles @claude mentions with proper authentication.

Just need the adder agent; the App does the rest.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,58 +0,0 @@
-name: Add Changelog Entry
-
-on:
-  workflow_call:
-    inputs:
-      pr_number:
-        description: PR number to add changelog entry to
-        required: false
-        type: number
-    secrets:
-      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:
-        description: Anthropic API key for Claude
-        required: true
-
-permissions:
-  contents: write
-  pull-requests: write
-  issues: write
-
-jobs:
-  add-changelog-entry:
-    name: Add Changelog Entry
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout PR branch
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
-        with:
-          ref: refs/pull/${{ inputs.pr_number || github.event.issue.number }}/head
-          fetch-depth: 0
-
-      - name: Run Claude changelog agent
-        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
-        with:
-          prompt: |
-            Create a changelog entry for this PR using the changelog:adder agent.
-          plugin_marketplaces: |
-            https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins.git
-          plugins: |
-            changelog@tenzir
-        env:
-          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
-
-      - name: Push changes
-        run: |
-          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
-          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          if git diff --quiet; then
-            echo "No changes to commit"
-          else
-            git add changelog/
-            git commit -m "Add changelog entry
-
-            🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
-
-            Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>"
-            git push origin HEAD:refs/pull/${{ inputs.pr_number || github.event.issue.number }}/head
-          fi

@@ -1,26 +0,0 @@
-name: Claude Changelog Entry
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-  # Manual trigger for testing
-  workflow_dispatch:
-    inputs:
-      pr_number:
-        description: PR number to add changelog entry to
-        required: true
-        type: number
-
-jobs:
-  add-changelog-entry:
-    # Trigger on /changelog command in PR comments
-    # Or via manual workflow_dispatch for testing
-    if: |
-      github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' ||
-      (github.event.issue.pull_request &&
-       contains(github.event.comment.body, '/changelog'))
-    uses: ./.github/workflows/changelog-add.yaml
-    with:
-      pr_number: ${{ github.event.inputs.pr_number || github.event.issue.number }}
-    secrets:
-      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}

@@ -33,29 +33,15 @@ It provides guidance on:
 
 ## 🔄 CI Integration
 
-Use the reusable workflow to enable `/changelog` commands in PRs:
-
-```yaml
-# .github/workflows/claude-changelog.yaml
-name: Claude Changelog Entry
-
-on:
-  issue_comment:
-    types: [created]
-
-jobs:
-  add-changelog-entry:
-    if: |
-      github.event.issue.pull_request &&
-      contains(github.event.comment.body, '/changelog')
-    uses: tenzir/claude-plugins/.github/workflows/changelog-add.yaml@main
-    secrets:
-      ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
+With the [Claude GitHub App](https://github.com/apps/claude) installed, comment on any PR:
+
+```
+@claude add a changelog entry
 ```
 
-Then comment on any PR with `/changelog`.
+Claude uses the `changelog:adder` agent to analyze the PR and create an appropriate entry.
 
 ## Requirements
 
 - [tenzir-changelog](https://github.com/tenzir/changelog) - Installable via `uvx` or `pip`
-- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` secret (for CI integration)
+- [Claude GitHub App](https://github.com/apps/claude) installed on the repository
